heading: Payment of small amounts to public creditors
label: 9841 Payment of small amounts to public creditors
text: When authorized by the Secretary of the Air Force, a disbursing official of Air Force or Space Force subsistence funds may keep a limited amount of those funds in the personal possession and at the risk of the disbursing official to pay small amounts to public creditors.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)984131:493.(proviso on p. 1166), .Mar. 2, 1907, ch. 251134 Stat. 1166The words “Secretary of the Air Force” are substituted for “Secretary of War” because of sections 205(a) and 207(a) and (f) of the Act of (ch. 343, , 502), and sections 1 and 53 of the Act of (ch. 1041, , 488, 676). For comparable provisions that apply to the Army, see the revision note for 10:4841.July 26, 1947August 10, 195661 Stat. 50170A Stat. 157
Amendments2021— inserted “or Space Force” after “official of Air Force”.Pub. L. 116–283
